description: CompositionBlue round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short raglan sleeves with gathers, an overturned buttoned flap and distressed graphic print on the frontFitRegularWash careMachine wash cold inside out with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach or wring Tumble dry or flat dry in shadeWarm iron; Do not iron on decorationsDesigned for those who enjoy motorcycle races, this t-shirt from wrangler makes for great casual wear. The short gathered sleeves enhances your feminine side, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with slim fFit jeans or cotton shorts and sandals and win in style.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 5'7", chest 33" and waist 26”
